OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Oct-05-2016 Off Calendar

Joint Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue (C.C.P. 397)
Off Calendar Aug-17-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Tad S. Shapiro of Shapiro Galvin Shapiro & Moran (707-544-5858) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party, David Dethman

Attorney, Caitlin Tallon Dimmaggio of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney (415-788-1900) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party, Environmental Resource Solutions, Inc.

Attorney, Adam D. Wilson of Collins Collins Muir & Stewart LLP (510-844-5100) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party, Boys & Girls Club of San Francisco

Attorney, Robert W. Marchi of Bradley Curley Asiano Barrabee et al LLP (415-464-8888 ext. 236) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party, Boys & Girls Club of San Francisco

Attorney, Christopher Lundy Campbell of Maranga Morgenstern (415-248-5315) appears as counsel for defendant, Daniel J. Campbell

The cause is argued and submitted by all sides present as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorhand reporter. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS ENVIRONMENTAL RESOURCE SOLUTIONS, INC. and BOYS AND GIRLS CLUBS OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Joint Motion For Change Of Venue (C.C.P. 397) is DENIED. Boys and Girls Clubs of San Francisco and Environmental Resources Solutions (based in Sonoma County) move based on asserted inconvenience of four non-party witnesses. However, none of the four witnesses has signed a declaration and plaintiff says three play minimal roles in the case, while the fourth was a party employee. Plaintiff also shows that his six treating physicians - all potential witnesses - are in the Bay Area and would thus be inconvenienced by venue in Mendocino County. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332, Bus. Tel: 415-551-3745, email: lmartinez@sftc.org. (D302)
